title: EQ - Dialog for "i" button is present and can be closed
scenario: Info icon next to EQ headline in Device Settings displays and dismisses explanatory dialog on tap
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and select the connected device.
3. Go to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
4. Observe the "i" (info) icon next to the EQ headline.
6. Observe the dialog that appears with explanatory text about Equalizer (EQ) functionality.
7. Tap on the dialog or anywhere else on the screen to dismiss it.
expected: The \"i\" (info) icon is present next to the EQ headline. Tapping it shows a dialog with explanatory text about EQ functionality. The dialog can be dismissed by tapping on it or anywhere else on the screen.
